# AGENTS.md

## Quick Start

```bash
pnpm dev        # H5 dev server (default)
pnpm dev:wx     # WeChat Mini Program
pnpm build      # Production build
pnpm lint       # ESLint check
pnpm lint:fix   # Auto-fix
pnpm test       # Vitest
```

## Critical: pnpm Only

This repo enforces pnpm via `preinstall` hook (`only-allow pnpm`). Do not use npm or yarn.

## Critical: Auto-Generated Files (gitignored)

These are generated by vite plugins — never edit manually, never commit:
- `src/pages.json` — generated from `src/pages/` directory + `pages.config.ts`
- `src/manifest.json` — generated from `manifest.config.ts`
- `auto-imports.d.ts` — auto-import type declarations
- `components.d.ts` — component resolution type declarations

## Path Alias

`~/` maps to `src/`. Use it for all imports.

## Auto-Imports (no manual import needed)

- **Vue APIs**: `ref`, `computed`, `watch`, `onMounted`, etc.
- **VueUse**: `useStorage`, `useDebounceFn`, etc.
- **Pinia**: `defineStore`, `storeToRefs`
- **uni-app APIs**: `getStorageSync`, `navigateTo`, etc.
- **Composables**: everything in `src/composables/`
- **Stores**: everything in `src/stores/`

Components in `src/components/` and `Wd*` (wot-ui) are auto-resolved — use directly in templates.

## Pre-Commit

`simple-git-hooks` runs: `pnpm lint-staged && pnpm type:check`

`lint-staged` runs `pnpm lint:fix` on `*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}`.

**Note**: `type:check` is currently a no-op (blank script). Do not rely on it to catch type errors — run `vue-tsc --noEmit` manually if needed.

## Styling

- Write CSS in `px`. PostCSS auto-converts to `rpx` (×2). Never write `rpx` directly.
- Prefer UnoCSS atomic classes over custom CSS.
- Use shortcuts from `.agents/rules/unocss.md` (`flex-center`, `wh-full`, `flex-col`, etc.).
- Use `<style scoped lang="less">` or `<style scoped lang="scss">` when custom CSS is needed.

## Component Library

wot-ui v2 (`@wot-ui/ui`). Components prefixed `Wd` are auto-imported. See `.agents/rules/ui-guidelines.md`.

## Platforms

Default: H5. Also supports: WeChat Mini Program (`mp-weixin`), HarmonyOS. Platform aliases configured in `unh.config.ts`.

## Commit Convention

Uses `czg` with `cz-git` + `commitlint`. Commit messages are bilingual (Chinese/English) with emojis. Run `pnpm cz` to commit interactively.

## Skills

- `wot-ui-v2` skill is installed for wot-ui component guidance — load it when working with WotDesign components.
